title: Iranian President’s Apology to Neighboring Gulf States Showcases Leadership Rifts
summary_full: Masoud Pezeshkian, the Iranian president, apologized for Iranian strikes on Gulf states before backtracking after criticism from other Iranian leaders. Despite his remarks, Iran has continued its attacks.
summary_public: Masoud Pezeshkian, the Iranian president, apologized for Iranian strikes on Gulf states before backtracking after criticism from other Iranian leaders. Despite his remarks, Iran has continued its attacks.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian president’s Apology to Neighboring Gulf States Showcases Leadership Rifts
